task_completion.description: Navigate to the Project Omega workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the 'Active Projects > Project Omega' workspace, displaying both the 'Project Closure Report' and 'Reusable Assets' folder.

task_completion.description: Initiate move for the Project Closure Report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent selecting the 'Project Closure Report' and clicking a 'Move', 'Cut', or 'Add to clipboard' button intended for moving the document.

task_completion.description: Complete move of the report to Archives
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating to the 'Archives > 2023' workspace and successfully pasting/moving the 'Project Closure Report', making it visible in the new location.

task_completion.description: Initiate copy for the Reusable Assets folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent selecting the 'Reusable Assets' folder and clicking a 'Copy' or 'Add to clipboard' button intended for copying the folder.

task_completion.description: Complete copy of the assets to Library
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating to the 'Templates > Library' workspace and successfully pasting/copying the 'Reusable Assets' folder, making it visible in the new location.

task_completion.description: Verify original assets are retained and report is removed
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Active Projects > Project Omega' workspace where the 'Reusable Assets' folder is still present, but the 'Project Closure Report' is no longer listed.

integrity.description: Agent used the Nuxeo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: All interactions occur within a web browser navigating the Nuxeo UI, not via terminal or API clients.
The agent uses Nuxeo's built-in clipboard or move/copy buttons rather than downloading files to the local machine and re-uploading them.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are opened to run shell scripts or move files directly in the backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in a Nuxeo Platform workspace. Source workspace: 'Active Projects > Project Omega'. The 'Project Closure Report' must be MOVED (not copied) to 'Archives > 2023'. The 'Reusable Assets' folder must be COPIED to 'Templates > Library'. A successful move removes the report from the source workspace, while a successful copy leaves the original assets folder in the source workspace.
